ideation: This sequence simulates the action of a robot picking up a handbag.  The robot will use both arms to carefully lift the bag.  The movement should be slow and deliberate, emphasizing the careful handling of a delicate object. The first frame shows the arms in a neutral position. The second frame shows the arms reaching down, and the third shows the arms lifting the handbag. The fourth frame shows the arms holding the handbag securely. The fifth shows the arms carrying the handbag.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to grasp
arms begin to reach down towards the bag
arms lift the handbag carefully from below
holding the handbag gently but securely
carrying the handbag forward with care
